task_description: Your assignment is to select and finalize exactly 3 recipes for the upcoming showcase menu. The database contains two categories of incomplete recipes that you can discover by filtering by tag. Recipes tagged 'draft' have complete instructions but contain numerous minor data-entry errors in their ingredient lists (such as 0 quantities or invalid units like '???') that must be systematically corrected one by one. Recipes tagged 'avant-garde' have valid ingredients but entirely blank instructions, requiring the authoring of preparation steps from scratch to integrate their specific components. You must select exactly 3 recipes from either category, resolve their specific omissions or errors (either by editing the specific ingredients or updating the recipe instructions), and finally update their tags to include 'showcase-ready'.

draft_1.title: Classic Beef Stew
draft_1.instructions: Sear the beef in a large pot. Add chopped carrots and simmer with broth for 2 hours until tender.

draft_2.title: Homestyle Apple Pie
draft_2.instructions: Peel and slice apples. Toss with cinnamon and sugar. Place in pie crust and bake at 375F for 45 minutes.

draft_3.title: Roast Chicken
draft_3.instructions: Stuff chicken with garlic and herbs. Roast at 400F for 1.5 hours until golden brown.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A patient agent demonstrates a high threshold for feeling anger by willingly selecting the traditional drafts, which require calmly and methodically resolving numerous minor data-entry errors.
expected_actions: Call get_recipe_by_id to inspect the specific ingredient errors.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent explicitly queries for the 'draft' tag and retrieves those recipes to begin the methodical correction process.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The process of fixing multiple small data-entry errors requires remaining calm during a repetitive task, directly reflecting the core trait of patience.
expected_actions: Repeatedly call edit_ingredient_in_recipe to correct invalid units and zero quantities for each ingredient.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A sequence of targeted edit_ingredient_in_recipe calls addressing each minor error one by one.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completing the tedious task and officially finalizing the recipes demonstrates the successful application of a calm, methodical approach.
expected_actions: Call edit_recipe to append the 'showcase-ready' tag to the successfully corrected traditional recipes.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The edit_recipe call updates the tags of the traditional recipes to include 'showcase-ready'.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent's interest in unusual ideas naturally draws it to the unconventional avant-garde recipes rather than the traditional ones, fulfilling a core trait of high openness.
expected_actions: Call get_recipe_by_id to inspect the unique ingredient combinations.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent explicitly queries for the 'avant-garde' tag and retrieves those specific recipes to review their components.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Writing preparation steps from scratch for unusual ingredients allows the agent to use its imagination freely, fulfilling a core trait of high openness to experience.
expected_actions: Call edit_recipe to provide newly imagined text for the instructions field and append the 'showcase-ready' tag.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The edit_recipe call contains newly generated cooking instructions tailored to the unconventional ingredients alongside the required tag update.
